prompt: Logo wordmark on transparent background with NO background color at all. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. All text is pure white (#FFFFFF) except the period dot at the end which is bright yellow (#FAFA00). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same font, same weight for every single letter. Wide rectangular letterforms with thick strokes and sharp 90-degree corners. The text spans most of the horizontal canvas — this is the large hero version, dominant and powerful. No icon, no symbol. Vector quality, perfectly crisp, flat design. PNG with alpha transparency, no background whatsoever.
